title: Evidence-First Insight Detail
summary: Implemented evidence-first insight detail across the dashboard, shared detail normalization, Telegram explanation parity, metadata enrichment, and telemetry, then cleared the final admin log-buffer test blocker.
next_action: No further implementation work is pending. Optional manual product validation can review dashboard detail copy and Telegram explanation output.

verification.notes: `mix precommit` passed on 2026-03-12 after implementing the shared insight-detail contract, dashboard accordion/detail rendering, Telegram parity, metadata.detail enrichment, and test synchronization for direct LogBuffer writes. The project has no separate lint or typecheck gate beyond compile/test.

resume_context.last_completed_step: Implemented the spec end to end and verified it with the full repo precommit gate.
resume_context.notes: Key follow-through included pruning expanded-card state across refreshes, filtering agent logs before applying log limits, and synchronizing tests that inject LogBuffer entries directly.

history.note: Initial draft created from repo context, existing insight metadata contracts, and user clarifications.
Audit found remaining gaps in dashboard refresh behavior, explanation-path parity, and telemetry plus rollout specificity.
Rewrote the draft to add refresh-safe state rules, shared explanation parity, privacy-safe delivery presentation, explicit telemetry contracts, rollout, and definition-of-done criteria.
Implementation began for the dashboard detail builder, render path, telemetry, and Telegram explanation parity.
Implemented the evidence-first insight detail contract, verified with `mix precommit`, and closed the remaining admin log-buffer test issue.
